'''Supreme Commander of the Corellian Defense Force''' was the highest ranking officer of the [[Corellian Home Fleet|Corellian defense fleet]].<ref name="Tempest" />

During the [[Second Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Five Worlds]] and the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]], [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] was appointed to this position after the [[Assassination of Thrackan Sal-Solo|death]] of [[Minister of War (Five Worlds)|Minister of War]] [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]].<ref name="Tempest" /> After Antilles resigned, the post was given to [[Genna Delpin]] by [[Five World Prime Minister]] [[Dur Gejjen]]. Later, the [[Five Worlds]] joined the [[Confederation]] against the Galactic Alliance.<ref name="Exile">''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]''</ref> Although Delpin was maintained in her position of Supreme Commander of the Corellian armed forces,<ref name="Fury">''[[Legacy of the Force: Fury]]''</ref> her duties were transferred to [[Turr Phennir]], the [[Supreme Commander of the Confederation military]].<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|I|181|Delpin, Genna}}</ref>
